binary_metadata.file_type: a /bin/env sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.depends: adduser, bundler, git, kali-defaults (>= 2026.2.1), lsof, nodejs, pwgen, ruby-mini-racer, ruby (>= 1:3.3), ruby (<< 1:3.4), libc6 (>= 2.38), libgcc-s1 (>= 3.0), libruby3.3 (>= 3.3.1), libssl3t64 (>= 3.0.0), libstdc++6 (>= 13.1), libyaml-0-2, zlib1g (>= 1:1.1.4)
apt_metadata.description:
Collaboration tools for penetration testing
Dradis is a tool to help you simplify reporting and collaboration.
.
- Spend more time testing and less time reporting
- Ensure consistent quality across your assessments
- Combine the output of your favorite scanners
.
Dradis is an open-source project released in 2007 that has been refined for
over a decade by security professionals around the world.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dradis because ### dradis.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dradis with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dradis --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web, ad] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### dradis.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install dradis
Install with: sudo apt install dradis
